positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration featuring a whimsical celestial gathering. The central element is a grouping of geometric constellations forming a flowing zodiac path across a deep twilight sky. Elements include stylized crescent moons, abstract stars rendered as glowing orbs, and nebulae depicted as smooth, ethereal color gradients (deep indigo, muted gold, sapphire blue). The overall composition is balanced and symmetrical, optimized for a central apparel print. Style: Modern vector art combined with cosmic Art Nouveau influence. Clean lines, strong, palpable contrast between the glowing stellar elements and the deep background. The mood is magical, peaceful, and mysterious. High resolution, crisp detail, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, messy, low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, photorealistic, grunge, noise, jpeg artifacts
